creator: antumdeluge@gmail.com
text: It looks to me that the function "require" in "/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.1/rubygems/core_ext/kernel_require.rb" is trying to load "curses", which it cannot find. But I am not familiar with the Ruby language nor interpreter so I can't be sure what the problem is. My guess is that it should be loading the "ncurses" module (/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.1/ncurses.rb) instead of "curses".
